app.name: Medical Care Connect
landing.title: Medical Care Connect
landing.subtitle: AI-Assisted Medical Intake and Consultation Platform
landing.description: Connect with qualified doctors for remote consultations. Our AI-assisted system helps collect your medical information before your consultation, saving time and ensuring your doctor has the full picture.
landing.aiNote: AI collects preliminary medical information only. Final clinical assessment belongs to your doctor.
landing.emergency: MCC is NOT an emergency service. If you are experiencing a medical emergency, call your local emergency number immediately.
doctor.title: Our Doctors
doctor.noResults: No doctors found matching your criteria.

consultation.notEmergency: This is not for emergencies. If you need urgent care, call emergency services.

intake.emergencyMsg: Please seek immediate medical attention. MCC is not an emergency service.

landing.featuresDescription: We combine AI-assisted intake with expert medical professionals for a seamless healthcare experience.
landing.features.expertDoctors.title: Expert Doctors
landing.features.expertDoctors.descripti: Connect with licensed specialists across multiple fields, all verified for quality care.
landing.features.personalizedCare.title: Personalized Care
landing.features.personalizedCare.descri: AI-assisted pre-consultation intake ensures your doctor has your complete medical context.
landing.features.securePrivate.title: Secure & Private
landing.features.securePrivate.descripti: End-to-end encryption and full compliance with healthcare data protection standards.
landing.features.instantMessaging.title: Secure Messaging
landing.features.instantMessaging.descri: Chat, share files, and communicate securely with your healthcare provider.
landing.features.continuousSupport.title: Continuous Support
landing.features.continuousSupport.descr: Ongoing care coordination and follow-ups to ensure the best health outcomes.
landing.features.available247.title: 24/7 Access
landing.features.available247.descriptio: Access your medical team and health records anytime, anywhere.
landing.howItWorksDescription: Get started in three simple steps and connect with the care you need.
landing.steps.register.title: Create Your Account
landing.steps.register.description: Sign up as a patient and complete your medical profile securely.
landing.steps.find.title: Find a Doctor
landing.steps.find.description: Browse verified specialists, read profiles, and choose the right fit.
landing.steps.consult.title: Start Consultation
landing.steps.consult.description: Begin your AI-assisted consultation journey with your chosen doctor.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to Transform Your Healthcare Experience?
landing.ctaDescription: Join thousands of patients who trust Medical Care Connect for their healthcare needs.
landing.ctaNoCard: No credit card required. Start your journey to better healthcare.
landing.emergency.title: Emergency Notice
landing.emergency.description: MCC is NOT an emergency service. If you are experiencing a medical emergency, call your local emergency number immediately.
landing.footerDescription: Your trusted platform for AI-assisted medical consultations, connecting patients with qualified healthcare professionals.
